scanner_blind_spots.reason: Scanner missed Celestica because EMS companies screen poorly on gross margin (12%) and P/B filters — but the AI networking infrastructure thesis requires qualitative assessment of 1.6T switch ramps, CPO hyperscaler programs, and post-earnings selloff dislocation. This is the #1 pick.

Pre-revenue biotech with no earnings screen traction — scanner cannot find companies with two concurrent Breakthrough Therapy designations stacking ASCO oral presentation + dual PDUFA in the same year without FDA calendar research

Royalty model disguised as biotech — scanner sees 154x P/B and 4,460x D/E and skips it, missing that ENHANZE is a pure royalty toll road at 6.5x Fwd earnings with 30-35% royalty growth. Highest value score in scanner batch.

Multi-executive cluster buy (CEO + division president same week) requires reading Form 4 filings in real-time — scanner finds single large insider buys but misses the C-suite cluster pattern across 48 hours

M&A strategic review with BofA + Goldman engaged is a binary catalyst the scanner cannot detect — 'strategic alternatives' disclosure requires reading IR press releases and SEC filings, not screening financial ratios
Elliott activist stake disclosed in 13G with 'significant' stake language — scanner missed the activist catalyst that puts a hard floor under margin expansion and buyback execution at Fwd P/E 13.6

Bioprocessing order inflection (+30% YoY, first positive in 24 months) is a leading indicator not visible in trailing revenue screens — scanner would see DHR as a slow-growth healthcare name, missing the cycle restart thesis
